Event: Tavern of Fortune - September 2025
Event Date: 25/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: B41
Nine Lives Bow

When attacking, has a [21%-23%] chance of dealing [80%-95%] damage to a group of enemies.
For the duration of the battle, the bow's owner has a 60% chance to reduce all stats of a random enemy unit by 30% for 4 sec. and throw a grenade at that unit. The grenade deals 196000 pure damage to the target, and causes shards to be thrown from the target at 2 nearest enemy units.
Upon hitting targets, the shards deal physical damage equal to 250% of the bow wielder's attack damage.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
